title: ahab
body:
aye aye captain
snappin two while inside i'm laughin at em
patch masking the side eye i'm castin at em
fishin cuz i can't fathom my life
deep in the lulls though asking why i'm a wise guy
when if i ever said i was right i lied
hi my name is just a byline
i've got a whale to catch
so that's what i do when i try
you could say i'm attached
wanna catch a ride write about whatever tails splash
so if i die trying they know i ain't fail cuz i'm bout it
started in a whole then i climbed out it
now i'm alone with my soul and sometimes doubt it
cuz when i get close enough to see it's i i see i'm surrounded still
bounded
bill don't
bill do
bank hard and toss a payload down it
before it kill you
high tide
its my time to put this rope back where i found it
let go the mast kept me from being grounded
all these years i couldn't be around cuz i was climbing mountains
before i knew how to come down em
up here i see the sea is angry
i used to sleep in the sound
when i use it to hide it doesn't seem so loud in my mind
it's what keeps me out of the eye in the middle of the maelstrom
if i got a bow i'm trying fiddle the outcome
riddle the stars with questions to fashion a legend out of
to share with my sailors when i see em
it's a craft i'm proud of
i'm only human
i got a thing that i'm doing
and when i see to it
i lose sight of the futile
so yeah you could say i'm mad
but i'm ahab
